entries.note: Active bulb glow + articulated pose sell a genuinely lit lamp.
Every named feature reads; glowing amber dial. Antenna thin, back plain.
Concentric brass lens is the hero; body leatherette a bit flat.
Signal-blue portable; clean keycap array + carriage.
Widened body killed the monolith; side vents help. Pure side still wants a boiler bulge.
Faithful but simple flat object; low silhouette by nature.
